hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$file" in *.env.local|*/.env.local|*/SyncFit.xcodeproj/*|*/SyncFit.xcodeproj|*.entitlements) echo "Blocked: '$file' is gitignored/generated or holds secrets. Edit ios/SyncFit/project.yml (then run xcodegen generate) or .env.example instead. See CLAUDE.md." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.json|*.md|*.css) [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/prettier ] && [ -f "$file" ] && ./node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
